acceptance_criteria.description: Ring 0 validator module compiles without errors
validateTaskRing0() implements all R0-T01 through R0-T14 and R0-T20 through R0-T24 rules; validateExecutionRecord() implements R0-T30 through R0-T34
acceptance_criteria.rubric: Verify: (1) validateTaskRing0(task, markdown, context) is exported and returns Ring0Result. It checks: R0-T01 schema validation via ajv, R0-T02 ID uniqueness via context, R0-T03 parent reference validity, R0-T04 description file existence, R0-T05/R0-T06 dependency reference validity, R0-T07 dependency symmetry using TaskValidationContext.siblingTasks, R0-T08 acyclicity via graph utilities from src/parsers/graph.ts, R0-T09 acceptance_criteria ID uniqueness, R0-T10 test/build/lint have verify field, R0-T11 review has rubric field, R0-T12 scope.files non-empty, R0-T13 context_refs non-empty, R0-T14 no self-references in blocked_by/blocks, R0-T20 H1 matches pattern, R0-T21 exactly 5 H2 sections, R0-T22 H2 order, R0-T23 no empty H2, R0-T24 H1 id matches JSON id. (2) validateExecutionRecord(record, context) is exported covering R0-T30 schema conformance, R0-T31 task_id reference, R0-T32 sequential run numbers, R0-T33 criterion_id reference, R0-T34 no duplicate criterion_ids. (3) Both functions are pure functions with no side effects. PASS if all rules implemented. FAIL if any missing.

acceptance_criteria.description: Validator follows established patterns from impl-7e2a9f1b and impl-3c8d5e0a Ring 0 validators
acceptance_criteria.rubric: Verify: (1) Uses ajv for JSON Schema validation (same setup pattern as spec and impl doc validators). (2) Uses shared heading extractor from src/parsers/markdown.ts for Markdown checks. (3) Uses graph utilities from src/parsers/graph.ts for acyclicity check. (4) Returns Ring0Result with per-rule pass/fail entries. (5) TaskValidationContext and ExecutionRecordContext interfaces are defined with appropriate fields. PASS if patterns are consistent. FAIL if divergent approaches used.
